task: put the yellow block on top of the drawer
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A yellow block is on a brown table. A white drawer is on the right side of the table. The block is a cube with a matte surface; the drawer has a flat surface. STRATEGY - First, reach for the block to grasp it. Then, transport it to the drawer. Finally, place the block on the drawer's surface. Failure modes include dropping the block during transport or misaligning it with the drawer. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the block at its body for a stable grasp. Step 2 grasp the block at its body for secure hold. Step 3 transport the block to the drawer's surface. Step 4 place the block on the drawer's surface.
Goal: on(yellow_block, drawer)
Scene: yellow_block, drawer, table
Step 1: reach(yellow_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow block
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, yellow_block, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, yellow_block) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(yellow_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow block
  contact: holding(yellow_block) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(yellow_block)
Step 3: transport(yellow_block -> drawer)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the drawer's surface
  spatial: above(yellow_block, drawer, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(yellow_block)
  done_when: above(yellow_block, drawer, 0.05)
Step 4: place(yellow_block -> drawer)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the drawer's surface
  contact: surface_contact(yellow_block, drawer) [completion]; released(yellow_block) [completion]
  pose: stable(yellow_block) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(yellow_block, drawer) AND released(yellow_block)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the yellow block
the body of the yellow block
an empty area on the drawer's surface
an empty area on the drawer's surface
